name: project-architecture
description: Visão geral da arquitetura do FRAME.AI Director

stack.frontend: React 19 + Vite 7 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS 4 + Radix UI + Framer Motion
stack.routing_backend: Express Router com controllers e services

directory_structure.server/routes: Definições de rotas Express com middleware
directory_structure.server/schemas: Esquemas Zod para validação de entrada

data_flow.authentication: httpOnly cookie (frame_token) com JWT, enviado automaticamente com credentials: include
data_flow.response_format: Sempre { success: boolean, data?: T, error?: string }
data_flow.error_handling: Controllers usam try/catch e next(e); errorHandler middleware captura e retorna JSON

key_patterns.controller_pattern: export const method: RequestHandler = (req, res, next) => { try { ... } catch (e) { next(e); } }

scripts.dev: pnpm dev — servidor + Vite hot reload
scripts.build: pnpm build — Vite build + esbuild server bundle
